name: Asteroids
description:
Asteroids is a space-themed shooter where the player controls a spaceship navigating a field of asteroids. The primary objective is to destroy these asteroids while avoiding collisions with them and enemy saucers. 

The game starts with a number of large asteroids scattered across the screen. The player's spaceship begins in the center of the screen. When an asteroid is shot, it breaks into smaller asteroids which are more difficult to hit but still pose a threat. This continues until the smallest asteroids are destroyed completely.

Periodically, enemy saucers appear, ranging in size, and attempt to shoot at the player's ship. The smaller saucer shoots more accurately. The player's ship has limited forward thrust. If the ship drifts off one edge of the screen, it reappears on the opposite edge.

The game ends when the player runs out of lives, which are lost when the ship collides with an asteroid or is hit by a saucer's projectile. The game continues until all lives are exhausted. Score is awarded for destroying asteroids and saucers. The player starts with a limited number of lives.

controls.arrow_up: Apply thrust to the spaceship in the direction it is facing.
controls.space: Fire a projectile (laser) from the spaceship.
controls.shift: Engage Hyperspace: Randomly teleports the spaceship to a new location on the screen. Risky, as the ship may reappear directly in the path of an asteroid or enemy projectile.
controls.arrow_down: Apply reverse thrust to the spaceship.
